summary: Tested Honey-Orange Gradient & Icon-Only Mobile UI refactor for ComposerBar and DailyPrompt Buzz In button. All 8 features verified working correctly.

desktop_composer_bar.all_5_buttons_visible: PASS - Now Spinning, Haul, ISO, Note, Randomizer all visible with labels
desktop_composer_bar.white_text_icons: PASS - All 5 buttons have rgb(255, 255, 255) text color

mobile_composer_bar_390px.all_buttons_icon_only: PASS - All 5 buttons have labels hidden (md:inline class)
mobile_composer_bar_390px.zero_horizontal_scroll: PASS - Container width 324px < viewport 390px, no scroll

critical_code_review_comments: ComposerBar spectrum array correctly defines Honey-Orange colors
Button CSS: 'h-9 w-9 aspect-square md:w-auto md:aspect-auto' correctly enforces icon-only circles on mobile
Label visibility: 'hidden md:inline' properly hides labels below 768px breakpoint
Container: 'justify-between w-full' ensures buttons span full width without scroll
DailyPrompt Buzz In button has inline gradient style matching ComposerBar Now Spinning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Honey-Orange Gradient UI refactor fully tested and working. ComposerBar colors: Now Spinning=gradient(#F9A825,#EF6C00), Haul=#F57C00, ISO=#E65100, Note=#D84315, Randomizer=#BF360C. All buttons have white text. On mobile (<768px), ALL 5 buttons are icon-only 36x36px circles with aspect-ratio 1/1. Daily Prompt Buzz In button also has matching honey-orange gradient. No horizontal scrolling issues.
